description: Metadata about a file attachment stored in ServiceNow.
name: Attachment

sys_id.description: Unique identifier for the attachment record.

file_name.description: The name of the attached file.

table_name.description: The table to which the attachment belongs.

table_sys_id.description: The sys_id of the record to which the file is attached.

content_type.description: The MIME type of the attached file.

size_bytes.description: The size of the attached file in bytes.

size_compressed.description: The compressed size of the attached file in bytes.

download_link.description: The URL to download the attachment file content.

image_height.description: The height in pixels if the attachment is an image.

image_width.description: The width in pixels if the attachment is an image.

hash.description: The MD5 hash of the file content.

state.description: The state of the attachment processing.

sys_created_on.description: The date and time the attachment was created.

sys_created_by.description: The user who uploaded the attachment.

sys_updated_on.description: The date and time the attachment was last modified.

sys_updated_by.description: The user who last modified the attachment record.
